name: aurora-radio-group
title: Aurora Radio Group
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Single-choice native radio group with Aurora focus glow and label-friendly semantics.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-input` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/radio-group.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-input`.
